programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his interview with Heather & Brian, feuding parents over 15-yr-old son Brandon's death. Hear from Brandon's friends, the last to see him alive and two of the young men make shocking allegations against Heather. How does she respond?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Crystal who accuses her ex-boyfriend of sexually assaulting their child. Crystal’s mom, Barbara, says Anthony is a “disgusting, lying, abusive narcissist” and he says Barbara is a “lowlife dirtbag”. Dr. Phil moderates. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2012, Amanda accused her ex-husband, George, a U.S. Army veteran, of molesting her then 7-year-old daughter, & he was sentenced to life in prison. George's parents, Harold and Cindy, believe their son was wrongfully convicted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2014, former live-in nanny Diane Stretton made headlines when she refused to move out of Marcella Bracamonte's home. The women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. Who's the victim in this mother vs. nanny feud?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Katlynn, Zach & Amber say dad Todd prioritizes everything over them: job, wife & new family. They say their dad missed weekend visits, failed to pay child support & even wrote a letter denouncing his parental rights. Could Todd do more or just a bad rap?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melisa says her estranged husband, Chris, is a pathological liar. Chris admits he has a problem with telling the truth and insists he wants to change -- but does he really? What's at the root of Chris' behavior? Should Melisa stay or call it quits?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cassie is stressed raising 4 children--Brinley, 15, smokes pot, vapes, and runs away, once claiming kidnapping. Cassie's husband, Jonah, with his drug & alcohol abuse, is a danger to her children. Dr. Phil enlists Brinley's help to enlighten the family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Karen & Jim are desperate to remove their violent, mooching son, Kyle, 31, from their home. They filed a restraining order against him & had him arrested for criminal trespassing, but Kyle is still in their home. Kyle says his parents are to blame. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2008, Julia was a single mom, homeless, & living in a car with daughters, Olivia, 15, Phoebe,12, & Olivia's newborn daughter. Her children entered foster care. Olivia's baby was adopted. This family seeks Dr. Phil's advice on reversing adoption. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his work with a family ripped apart by accusations of child molestation. Father Jason agrees to take a polygraph test to prove his innocence. Tune in to find out the results and what's next for this family!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Stephanie was an aspiring songwriter who loved taking care of kids. Diana was a preschool teacher with a bright future. Neither of these women knew they could end up addicted to drugs.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues conversation with Shemida and her sister, Dana, who says Shemida’s 70-plus diagnoses are tearing the family apart. Dr. Phil unites this family in an effort to find answers. Is Shemida really sick, or is she addicted to attention? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Santa Claus is coming to town--but so are obnoxious relatives, gifts you have no use for, and drunken co-workers. Dr. Phil, along with etiquette expert Peggy Post, have answers for handling uncomfortable situations at end-of-year festivities.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil shines a light on domestic violence speaking with Kaitlyn, defending her pro-fighter husband, Josh, while he's being held in jail without bail. And hear Trichelle, facing 20 years in prison after she says she killed her husband in self-defense.

programme.desc: Chelsea, Cameran, Eliza, Danni, and Kathryn hit the slopes for their first-ever ski lesson, while Craig, Austen and Madison go snowboarding; Austen and Madison's relationship heats up; tensions arise during a cannabis-infused dinner.

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: After a raucous night in Colorado, Cameran and Whitney hightail it back to Charleston, while the others hit the hot springs; Austen and Madison's road to reconciliation is a rocky one; Madison repeats a rumor that throws Shep and Danni under the bus.

programme.title: Southern Charm

programme.title: Southern Charm

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Austen and Madison's bond is stronger than ever; Kathryn reveals a bit of gossip to Craig; with a new girlfriend and a therapist in tow, Shep's new and improved attitude leaves him determined to keep his nose out of his everyone's business.

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Shep continues to spread gossip at his party, upsetting Madison and ultimately affecting his friendship with Austen; Leva comes to Cameran's defense and confronts Kathryn for igniting the rumor mill; Patricia suggests John pursue Madison.

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Leva hosts a Persian dinner for the girls; the boys discover John doesn't honor bro-code; Shep and Taylor double-date with Austen and Madison; Kathryn finds out a secret about Thomas.

programme.title: Southern Charm
programme.desc: Despite tensions among the guys, they prepare for Patricia's annual dinner party; John follows Patricia's advice and decides to pursue Madison, even though he would be breaking bro-code with Austen; Charleston deals with the onset of coronavirus.

programme.title: Southern Charm

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamada a Texas para realizar consultas sobre los asesinatos de prostitutas, la evidencia apunta a asesinatos con connotaciones religiosas. Pero a medida que profundicen en la investigación, el equipo podría poner en riesgo sus vidas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC continúa su investigación de asesinato en Texas y las pistas descubren una profunda red de corrupción que podría ser el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras buscan al brutal asesino de un marine, el equipo de NCIS y Gibbs se encuentran enfrentándose nuevamente al agente del FBI Fornell.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Un marine hallado en su garaje lleva a sospechar al protegido del FBI, Tobias Fornell. La investigación se intensifica cuando el sospechoso huye de un nuevo crimen. Ziva, mientras planea sus vacaciones, descubre una foto misteriosa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga un crimen durante la temporada de Halloween, donde un asesino psicótico deja pistas sobre la identidad de su próxima víctima en la red.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs se enfrenta a un desafío cuando Vance le asigna un nuevo asistente novato para investigar un caso de robo a un banco. La tensión aumenta mientras Gibbs y su nuevo compañero tratan de resolver el crimen y superar sus diferencias en el camino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Negocios personales
programme.desc: Después de que Emily Harrison (Danielle Savre) le dice a Danny y Baez que teme que su ex novio abusivo vuelva a comportarse de la misma manera con su nueva novia, Emily se convierte en la principal sospechosa cuando él es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The victim of the home invasion robbery tells a dispatch operator that a man held him at gun-point. A man in a wheelchair is in a stand-off with campus police. Officers respond to a call about a knife-wielding assailant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a devastating car wreck after a high-speed chase, officers apprehend and question a robbery suspect, and a wanted man tries to flee from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Numerous patrol cars give chase to a man on a dirt bike refusing to yield, and an alleged armed robber is upfront about his reasons for running from police when approached.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teen holding a beer walks up to a Deputy. A jet skier violates a no wake zone. Deputies cut a tangled bird free. A minor discards his can of alcohol and tells Deputies his mom will pay his citation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A remorseful woman is arrested for lewd conduct during Mardi Gras. Police officers are dispatched into the busy streets of New Orleans during the super bowl in search of ticket scalpers. Police Department investigates a theft at a local store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An out-of-control woman needs to be subdued after an arrest. Deputies spot an erratic driver who appears to be under the influence. A car is seen being driven backwards on a one-way street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wearing women’s underwear exposes himself. While on patrol officers question a naked man in the backseat of a vehicle who explains to officers that he’s camping. It takes several officers to take down a deranged naked man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: Footloose

programme.title: A la orilla de un palmar
programme.desc: La Fierecilla Domada de Shakespeare es la base argumental de esta película. La acción y los personajes se transladan a un pequeño pueblo rural de la costa mexicana y la acción se adereza con números musicales basados en el folklore local.

programme.title: La ley de las pistolas
programme.desc: El Gavilán es un justiciero que roba a los ricos para ayudar a los pobres de la región. Sin embargo en otra ranchería, una banda a nombre del Gavilán, está haciendo lo mismo pero su metodología es aterradora.

programme.title: Esos de Penjamo
programme.desc: Un ranchero se casa con su prima para que sus herederos puedan quedarse con sus propiedades cuando muera. Al no poder quedar en embarazo, su ambiciosa cuñada toma provecho de la situación.

programme.title: Por ellas, aunque mal paguen
programme.desc: Un aristócrata arruinado casa a su hija con un rico ranchero para no caer en la pobreza, sin saber que este es más astuto que ellos y los pone a trabajar duro en el campo.

programme.title: Cuidado con el amor
programme.desc: Pedro, con la ayuda de dos mejores amigos de su padre busca un tesoro enterrado en una hacienda colonial. Elsa y su madre quieren impedirlo. Al fin el amor interviene y Pedro y Elsa comparten la fortuna y su felicidad.

programme.title: Sin Rastro
programme.desc: Un hombre busca a su esposa desaparecida luego de que se rompe su coche en una ruta desierta.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Ojo por ojo
programme.desc: La madre de una niña asesinada (Sally Field) se plantea tomar la justicia por su mano después de que la policía y los tribunales hayan estropeado el caso contra el asesino (Kiefer Sutherland).

programme.title: De carne y hueso
programme.desc: Una figura del pasado despierta un recuerdo profundo y oscuro, como una historia familiar escrita a sangre fría.

programme.title: Familia de medianoche

programme.title: Pelota Dura
programme.desc: Un joven desubicado quien apuesta y bebe, acepta ser el entrenador de un equipo de las pequeñas ligas de Cambrini Green en Chicago como condición de un préstamo que le hizo un amigo.

programme.title: Casi famosos
programme.desc: Un chico de secundaria tiene la oportunidad de escribir una historia para la revista Rolling Stone sobre una banda emergente mientras los acompaña en su gira.

programme.title: Inside Llewyn Davis (en español)
programme.desc: Inside Llewyn Davis sigue a un joven cantante de folk mientras recorre la escena folk de Greenwich Village en 1961. Llewyn Davis (Oscar Isaac) lucha por triunfar contra obstáculos aparentemente insuperables, algunos de ellos creados por él mismo.

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: Una auténtica historia del mundo de las carreras en el momento de la depresión, cuyas victorias animaron no solo a los espíritus del equipo que los apoyaba, sino también a toda una nación.

programme.title: Pelota Dura
programme.desc: Un joven desubicado quien apuesta y bebe, acepta ser el entrenador de un equipo de las pequeñas ligas de Cambrini Green en Chicago como condición de un préstamo que le hizo un amigo.

programme.title: Misión imposible 2
programme.desc: El espía más grande del mundo, Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise), regresa junto con la hermosa Nyah Hall para detener al agente renegado Sean Ambrose, antes de que este libere un nuevo tipo de terror en un mundo desprevenido.

programme.title: Actos de violencia
programme.desc: Cuando su prometida es secuestrada por traficantes de personas, Roman y sus hermanos ex-militares se proponen localizarla y salvarla antes de que sea demasiado tarde.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: Peligro en la montaña
programme.desc: Jason Momoa protagoniza este intenso thriller de acción sobre un leñador que lucha por sobrevivir contra los traficantes de drogas que han escondido heroína en su cabaña de caza.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros
programme.desc: Clive Owen protagoniza esta épica aventura del arte de pelear con espadas, un guerrero caído que lucha para vengar a su deshonrado maestro (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: Las aventuras del niño tiburón y la niña de fuego
programme.desc: De Robert Rodriguez, el director de la franquicia Mini Espías, llega una aventura de superhéroes para toda la familia. Esta es la historia de una niña con la fuerza de un volcán que se une a un niño criado por tiburones blancos.

programme.title: Un gallo con muchos huevos
programme.desc: Cuando su hogar se ve amenazado por un malvado granjero, un pequeño gallo viene al rescate. En esta excelente película animada de larga duración, la cual garantiza hacer reír a toda la familia.

programme.title: Bienvenidos al ayer
programme.desc: Cuando cinco adolescentes descubren una máquina que puede enviarlos al pasado, las posibilidades parecen ser infinitas. Pero al cambiar el pasado, amenazaron el futuro del mundo. ¿Podrán deshacer el daño causado antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: La guerra de los mundos
programme.desc: Una narrativa contemporánea del clásico H.G.Wells, esta historia de suspenso y ciencia ficción revela la extraordinaria lucha por el futuro de la humanidad a través de los ojos de una familia americana.

programme.title: La isla
programme.desc: Un hombre huye tras descubrir que en realidad es un “ser clonado”, y permanece junto a otros en un lugar único.

programme.title: El legado
programme.desc: Un exconvicto recientemente liberado y su hermano menor adoptivo se ven obligados a huir. Perseguidos por un criminal vengativo, los federales y un grupo de soldados de otro mundo, su única protección es un arma encontrada de ascendencia misteriosa.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el piloto?
programme.desc: Considerada "una de las 10 películas más divertidas de la historia" por el American Film Institute, "¿Y dónde está el piloto?" es una obra maestra de la comedia de disparate.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el piloto? II
programme.desc: El primer transbordador espacial comercial envía al chiflado Ted (Robert Hays) y a su exnovia (Julie Hagerty) a un viaje a la Luna.

programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.desc: Cansado de ser dado por sentado por su esposa y sus 3 hijas, Rodolfo Guerra se levanta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Entonces comienza la locura.

programme.desc: Lillian Hellman's hit stage play is brilliantly brought to life by an all-star cast in a smoldering tale of two sisters living out their latter years in New Orleans who must face hidden family secrets when their ne'er-do-well brother returns home.

programme.title: The Big Knife
programme.desc: Hollywood star Charlie Castle (Jack Palance) has it all... but no way out. When he tries to quit show business, his studio boss (Rod Steiger) blackmails him with a secret. Now, he could lose everything... including his soul! Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: Chitty Chitty Bang Bang (1968)
programme.desc: A weird inventor, Caractacus Potts, invents an amazing flying car, which drives by itself. It takes him and his Family to Vulgaria, where the sinister buffoon Baron Bomburst kidnaps the car.

programme.title: The Bellboy
programme.desc: Lewis stars as Stanley, a non-speaking, bumbling bellhop at the ritzy Fontainebleau Hotel in Florida’s Miami Beach. Guests may come and guests may go, but Stanley is on duty day after day at the posh resort, encountering all sorts of catastrophes.

programme.title: Don't Give Up The Ship
programme.desc: New bridegroom called to D.C. to explain what happened to a navy destroyer escort gone since WWII.

programme.title: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: Audrey Hepburn's portrayal of a modern-day princess, rebelling against the royal obligations, who explores Rome on her own. This romantic comedy ranks as one of the most enjoyable films of all times.

programme.title: Sabrina
programme.desc: Bogie and Holden are the mega-rich Larrabee brothers of Long Island. Bogie’s all work, Holden’s all playboy. But when Sabrina (Hepburn), daughter of the family’s chauffeur, returns from Paris, the stage is set for some family fireworks.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.desc: On the eve of the biggest fight of his career, Tony loses interest in boxing when his girlfriend announces she may be expecting his baby.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Louie is worried his blind girlfriend will no longer love him if an operation to restore her sight is successful.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Oscar Madison finds a friend with inside information on his favorite sport, horse racing, he begins to win every bet.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix Unger is irate when given notice of another rent increase and organizes the entire building to go on strike until certain repairs and improvements are made to either justify the increase or cancel it altogether.

programme.title: My Three Sons

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie's guitar playing and singing makes him at hit at the local coffeehouse.

programme.desc: Laura regrets enrolling Rob into art lessons after the teacher appears to show an interest in him.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe's entry into the beekeeping business disrupts newlyweds Steve and Betty JO Elliott.

programme.desc: Newlywed Betty Jo encourages her husband Steven to become an apple polisher to secure a lucrative crop--dusting contract.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: A feud develops over the Bradley family dog's apparently divided loyalty.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction

programme.desc: Someone tries to kill Ken Mitchell, the head of a toy-making firm. Not wanting a violent incident to be associated with a toy business, Mitchell instead hires Joe Mannix to find out who might have tried to kill him.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An arrogant football player decides to have a fling. But when he gets rough with the girl, she tries to leave. They get into a scuffle that ends with her dead.

programme.desc: The grieving sister of a wealthy business tycoon, and expert sailor, hires Barnaby to investigate his so-called accidental death aboard his boat at sea.

programme.desc: A man was given a phony subpoena to appear in court so that he could be framed for the assassination of a judge who had been nominated for a seat on the Supreme Court.

programme.desc: Steve hunts for 2 law-evading fugitives linked to an armored truck robbery. A former cop complicates the search. The ex-officer's drunk behavior enabled the robbery.

programme.desc: Tennis star defects to US during a Hawaiian tourney. In love with American Brent Saunders, she's taken from her Communist team. Plans upset when team member Peter Valchek murders coach, putting Steve McGarrett in dangerous international situation.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0

programme.desc: Brilliant Uni students dupe entire Honolulu with false tidal wave alert, stealing millions in jewelry. Even McGarrett is fooled in Five-O.

programme.desc: A boy's toy Batmobile car provides an important clue for detectives struggling to make a case against a serial killer who stalks and kills waitresses.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A man suspected of the cold case murder of his wife and son hatches a new plot to kill his mother and father; and detectives solve the 20-year-old murder of a teenager by tricking her killer into licking an envelope.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: When a Nevada couple demands the return of a baby they had sold to another couple, the burned body of the baby turns up in Arizona. Then, a man discovers a barrel in his crawlspace that contains the body of a woman who has been dead for decades.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Advances in DNA technology that take place over 20 years help police to finally identify the man who brutally stabbed two women to death.

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.desc: Firefighter Gary Parks is killed in a fire ruled arson, the investigation into his death shifts to homicide. A serial arsonist is thought to be the culprit.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic

programme.title: Cold Case Files

programme.desc: Durante seis años, un asesino en serie merodeó por las calles de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Entre 1985 y 1988, 18 personas fueron asfixiadas, abusadas sexualmente y dadas por muertas en las remotas montañas de California.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un embrague de testigos
programme.desc: Dos testigos presenciales pueden tener la llave de la muerte de un miembro de una pandilla de motociclistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, se descubrieron un cráneo humano y algunos huesos en un campamento de niños exploradores cerca de Farmington, Missouri. La reconstrucción facial ayuda a los investigadores en este caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer joven de repente se enferma gravemente y, finalmente, no puede caminar. Una prueba de médula ósea revela la causa: arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los jóvenes navajos del suroeste estaban muriendo a un ritmo alarmante. Los curanderos de la tribu proporcionaron a los investigadores una pista fundamental que llevaría al otro lado del mundo al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina
programme.desc: Se investiga la aparente sobredosis y suicidio de la esposa del reverendo Bill Guthrie, Sharon, y los detectives recuperan archivos incriminatorios de la computadora de Bill y se enteran de su infidelidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, el cuerpo de la bailarina exótica Rachel Siani fue encontrado debajo de un puente de Nueva Jersey. Los investigadores se preguntaron si se había suicidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 20 de Mayo del 2001, Carrie Nelson fue golpeado hasta su muerte mientras trabajaba en unas oficinas comerciales. El caso quedó sin resolver durante seis años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie andaba suelto y la policía tenía que encontrarlo antes de que atacara nuevamente. Su pista más prometedora era inusual: una huella dactilar sangrienta en el cuerpo de una de las víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pareja perfecta
programme.desc: Una examinación de la primera vez que se utilizó ADN animal para resolver un caso penal

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Placas y mentiras
programme.desc: Un estudiante universitario fue encontrado muerto y la evidencia sugirió que conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El examinador médico clasificó la muerte como un accidente, pero los detectives que investigaron el caso declararon que la evidencia en la escena indicaba lo contrario.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: De fotografía
programme.desc: Una adolescente de Modesto, California desapareció. No había señales de lucha en su casa y la policía sospechaba que ella simplemente se había escapado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Inyección de venganza
programme.desc: Una enfermera de 34 años experimenta una variedad de síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe. Ninguno de sus médicos logra descubrir la causa, hasta que visita al ginecólogo para un chequeo de rutina.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El pensamiento rápido de un investigador lo ayuda a capturar una huella de zapato hecha en la nieve antes de que la evidencia se desvanezca.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trampa para turistas
programme.desc: En 1993, el estado de Florida era conocido por algo más que Disney World. La atención mundial se centró en una serie de robos dirigidos a turistas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una maestra dedicada y respetada desapareció, la policía tuvo que determinar si se había ido de vacaciones sin decírselo a nadie, o si era víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El mal pie
programme.desc: La policía estaba desconcertada por una huella oscura encontrada en la escena del crimen donde un hombre había sido asesinado y dos adolescentes resultaron gravemente heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Programado para el desastre
programme.desc: Una mujer de 29 años murió instantáneamente cuando una bomba explotó en su casa. El dispositivo era tan poderoso que la metralla estaba incrustada en las casas al otro lado de la calle.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: After an unusual online audition process, the rookie candidates for the 2020 squad move into an isolated training camp bubble amid the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 20 rookies try to master a socially distanced version of the famous kick line and some intricate choreography, and Kelli helps the ladies get fitted for uniforms.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Guest choreographers test the rookies with new routines, the veterans arrive at camp determined to earn back their spots, and country star Mickey Guyton has inspiring words for the hopefuls.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure's on for rookies and vets as the hopefuls head to the stadium for their first field rehearsal, and Kelli and Judy must decide which women won't move on in training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies outshine the veterans when choreographer Travis Wall teaches a sexy dance number, and Kelli and Judy give some of the vets a wake-up call.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers get a chance to showcase their unique talents during show group auditions, and Kelli and Judy deliberate with guest judges to select the elite squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers test their ability to think on their toes during a series of mock-press interviews, and as auditions wind down, a shocking bit of news shakes up the process for Kelli and Judy.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make cuts via video chat after a positive test for COVID-19 halts camp, Charlotte Jones hands out the iconic uniforms, and the team performs its game-day entrance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As 51 rookies and veterans arrive to chase their dreams, the candidates hope to prove their talent with a standout solo performance and take on the kick line in the Judges' Showcase.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft comes to the first rehearsal to see which newbies have showmanship, DCC alum Natalie Woods hosts a rookie at her home, and Kelli and Judy make the first cuts of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 47 hopefuls learn the mechanics of the kickline, a rookie's injuries put her out of commission, and choreographer Evan Miller teaches a dance routine that calls for power and precision.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With nine cuts looming before the team's first game, the hopefuls show off their freestyle dancing, get fit for their official uniforms and learn new choreography from Denise Dicharry.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Choreographer Criscilla Anderson uses her cancer battle to inspire the dancers, veteran mentors offer style tips to the rookies, and Travis Wall helps Judy and Kelli make their next cut.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The hopefuls practice the highly precise entrance routine and jump kicks for the first time, Jordann shares a vulnerable personal story, and Judy and Kelli make two more tough cuts.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar comes to the aid of his good friend Dr Rick Garcia, a vet who is having trouble taming a terrier with epilepsy; Cesar helps a timid Rottweiler called Tank.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this episode, the decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Was it an accident, an unexplained illness or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: They thought the fire would cover their crime. But one tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, remained. It held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Witnesses saw a woman in the back of a truck, flailing her arms and screaming. When they found a jacket near a pool of blood, they knew what they had seen wasn't a joy ride.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Faced with three homicides that appear to be professional executions, investigators on both sides of the Atlantic must find a common thread between the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son were abducted during a carjacking. The crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Observe the islands' natural rhythms and the challenges of bringing forth new life in this wild outpost; watch as turtles return to their nesting sites, rival iguanas butt heads to win a new mate, and albatrosses conduct sweet courtship dances.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: On the first day of spring in Australia, creatures look for either dinner or a date, ranging from kangaroos in the grasslands to koalas in the trees and freshwater crocodiles.

programme.title: Scotland: A Wild Year

programme.title: Deep Dive North America
programme.desc: Embark on a journey as Lizzie traverses air, land and sea to encounter Alaskan wildlife and explore some of the world's most remote corners; join scientists eavesdropping on underwater Arctic residents.

programme.title: Deep Dive North America

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Getting acquainted with an array of ocean oddballs and learning how billions of years' worth of changes have shaped their looks and skills; meeting blind worms who fish, walking sharks, tree-climbing crabs and much more.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: Rare penguins are locked in a daily game of cat and mouse with giant New Zealand sea lions; the sea lions also live in a tumultuous world, where pups must battle the elements to survive.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: See a fight between male Cuttlefish, and discover Anemone City before observing the sponge spawning ceremony; meet a Dugong in heat, two dangerous species of Sea Snakes and a choreographic display.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Discover how scientists are working to restore and protect the Galapagos; witness penguin health checks, tortoise tagging and battles against invasive species, which are building a sustainable future for this delicate, one-of-a-kind ecosystem.

programme.title: Lionfish: The New Pirates of the Caribbean
programme.desc: Exploring the lion fish, introduced in the 1990s, posing a threat to native species.

programme.title: Fur Seals: Battle for Survival
programme.desc: Engaging in a game of survival with two New Zealand fur seal pups.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: Vancouver Island is the largest island on the west coast of North America; every inch of the island from its mountains to its forests is connected to the sea and every animal has to find a way to fit into that alliance to survive.

programme.title: Grey seals: a journey of survival
programme.desc: Uncover the new havens and habits of the rapidly dwindling grey seal population.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: ¡Celos, arena y mar!
programme.desc: Los influencers más top llegan a Cartagena. Leslie e Isaac se encuentran por primera vez después de conocerse por las redes sociales. Una riña entre Lizbeth y Ana comienza a dividir a los bandos en la villa. El primer ex hace temblar a algunos.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: La manada más salvaje
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Diana se perfilan como las más odiadas del grupo, mientras que el nuevo ex le quita el lugar a Christian. Yurgenis avanza con Brandon y una fiesta salvaje rompe con todo lo que ellos creían de sí mismos.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: De la broma a la guerra
programme.desc: La tablet manda a Ana e Isaac a una cita romántica y Leslie tambalea. La sala tornado abre sus puertas y sus vientos traen muchas dudas. Lizbeth y Diana planean una broma que no termina nada bien. La llegada del próximo ex podría ser devastadora.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: El tiburón tiene colmillo
programme.desc: Los nuevos ex abren las puertas a más problemas. Diana se pone malacopa y amarga la fiesta más dulce. Un tiburón de dos patas visita la villa y lo que parecía un chiste termina siendo una verdadera amenaza. La primera Love Suite es para...

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento
programme.desc: La llegada de Michelle hace arder la villa. La sala tornado pone de cabeza los sentimientos de Leslie. Christian inicia la llama del amor con Andrea mientras que Diana provoca una explosión.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: No soportas, ¿verdad?
programme.desc: Lalo viene a terminar los pendientes con Leslie y a Isaac le toca atacarse. Lizbeth explota contra Isaac y Rufas. Yurgenis se libera en un catamarán, sin la sombra de Brandon. El nuevo ex llega muy salsa, pero de la que no pica.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: El jaque mate
programme.desc: Ana saborea el plato de la venganza, mientras que Leslie se limpia las lágrimas con su orgullo. Un divertido día de playa se convierte en una pesadilla. La llegada del nuevo ex cambia el juego y La Divaza tira los dados cuando no es su turno.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Veo, veo y no veo claro
programme.desc: La Divaza decide quién debe abandonar la villa. Carolina no controla su ira y le desacomoda las extensiones a Yurgenis. Isaac respeta su condición y va por su próxima conquista. La tablet del terror desata una nueva oleada de discusiones.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Aquí se arma la de cantina
programme.desc: Leslie e Isaac se hacen novios. Una discusión provoca que Lizbeth le moje las pestañas a Ali y se desate la guerra. El nuevo ex se lleva la sorpresa de encontrarse con dos ex-amores. Rufas tiene las llaves de la Love Suite.

programme.desc: Patricio se une a la clase de la Señora Puff pero comienza a traerle muchos problemas a Bob / Don Cangrejo lleva a Bob y Calamardo a pescar almejas para celebrar su millonésimo dólar

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Es un Fondo de Bikini Prehistórico y pasaremos un día en la vida de Esponja Gar, Patar y Squog

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo se compra un caracol pura sangre llamado Snelle y decide competir en la carrera de caracoles / Cuando Don Cangrejo se siente muy viejo, decide unirse a Bob Esponja y Patricio a una noche de libertinaje en la ciudad

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo se come una cangreburguer podrida y termina en el Hospital. El Holandés Volador viene a llevarse su alma / Bob Esponja tiene un accidente deslizándose por la arena. Preocupado por su seguridad, decide no salir de su casa

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo abre un parque de diversiones para atraer niños y su dinero al Crustáceo Cascarudo / Durante un viaje de campamento junto a Bob Esponja y Patricio, Calamardo es atacado por un oso marino

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja pierde su tarjeta de identificación del Crustáceo Cascarudo / Plankton crea un pequeño ejército para apoderarse de la fórmula de las cangreburguers

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja sigue su sueño de crear una maquina voladora con sus pantalones, y así poder volar junto con las medusas

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja ha delatado al Estrangulador que es arrestado por tirar basura. Pero el Estrangulador escapa, jurando capturar a la persona que lo delató. / Bob Esponja y Patricio se rocían con aerosol invisible.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja consigue un empleo en el Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Bob Esponja usa una aspiradora para quitar una almeja de su jardín. / Bob conoce una ardilla llamada Arenita.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja construye un puesto para hacer burbujas. / Bob Esponja rompe sus pantalones y aprovecha para ser gracioso.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio intentan convencer a Calamardo para que los acompañe a pescar medusas. / El Crustáceo Cascarudo se convierte en un caos cuando Plankton intenta robar la fórmula secreta de la Cangrebúrguer.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo hace que Bob Esponja y Patricio ya no sean amigos y trata de unirlos. / Bob Esponja hace una prueba de conducción con ayuda de Patricio.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Calamardo tratan de entregar una pizza a un cliente del Crustáceo Cascarudo. / Bob Esponja busca una casa nueva después de que los nematodos se comieran su casa.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio visitan a sus héroes Sirenoman y Chico Percebe a un asilo. / Bob Esponja olvida la fórmula de las Cangreburguers después de que olvido los pepinillos de la Cangreburguer de un cliente.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja es vigilante del aula y vigila la ciudad erróneamente ocasionando caos en la ciudad del Fondo de Bikini. / Bob Esponja se lleva una medusa a su casa.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi arrives in Alubarna with just enough time to stop the rebellion, but the agents of Baroque Works lurk in every corner, waiting to sabotage her plans for peace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji buys Vivi some time by mixing it up with a foe of many faces. Outside Alubarna’s walls, Chopper and Usopp tangle with Miss Merry Christmas and her slugging sidekick.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp finally shows some courage by using a five-ton hammer to play whack-a-mole with Miss Merry Christmas. He may be bluffing, but the distraction lets Chopper zero in on the enemy’s weakness.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper’s Rumble Ball could be the difference between life and death in the mole ballgame. Elsewhere, Sanji has trouble kicking a pretty enemy, and Vivi proposes something unthinkable.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi continues preparations to blow up the palace; Zorro puts his steel to the test against a lethal blade-man; Sanji tries to overcome his inability to kick a foxy lady!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Things don’t look good for the prettiest Straw Hat. Nami’s about to tangle with a thorny adversary, and the weapon Usopp built her is only good for party tricks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile reveals his sinister motives for attacking Alabasta, and Nami tries to end her duel with Miss Doublefinger by unleashing the Clima Tact’s ultimate weapon: a devastatingly lethal tornado!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro hopes to attain a new level of strength when he fights a foe with a body made of blades. The Straw Hat sword-slinger is determined to become a man who can cut steel – or die trying.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Koza – the leader of the rebel army – finally discovers the evil mastermind behind Alabasta’s drought, but is he too late to prevent further bloodshed?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Koza is mysteriously shot, the rebellion is reborn, but Vivi’s cries for a cease-fire fall on deaf ears until a long-overdue hero swoops to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finally discovers the secret to knocking out a sandman, but it won’t matter unless Vivi and the rest of the Straw Hats can locate the Baroque Works bomber.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While his mates search for a bomb, Luffy narrowly survives his second scrape with Crocodile. Across town, Nico Robin strong-arms Cobra into revealing his country’s greatest secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the walls crumbling down around them, Crocodile attacks Luffy with a poisoned pirate hook. Meanwhile, Vivi draws a bead on the bombers, but can she stop them in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats team up to give Vivi one last shot at disarming the bomb that threatens to destroy her city. She succeeds in cutting the fuse, but Crocodile has a backup plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pell’s sacrifice spares his beloved city, but only an act of god can stop the rebellion. With Crocodile’s poison coursing through his body, Luffy musters a final attack against Alabasta’s oppressor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile is defeated, the rain has returned to Alabasta, and Vivi’s people are eager to rebuild their kingdom. As for the Straw Hats, they have a fleet of marines breathing down their necks.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Now that the rebellion is over, Vivi must make an important decision about her future. The Straw Hats are ready to hoist the anchor, but an ambiguous villain has stolen the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Mr. 2 is a man of many faces, but he finally shows his true colors when the marines attack the Straw Hats. Elsewhere, Vivi has a scheme up her sleeve, and it involves Igaram wearing a dress.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew watch Alabasta fade into the distance, but there’s no time for reminiscing. The marines are in hot pursuit, and there’s a stowaway aboard the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fresh off their adventure Alabasta, the Straw Hats discover an isolated island where they can restock their food supply. Chopper is left to guard the ship, but he and Nico spend the afternoon exploring instead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When a mail-order salesman gets lost at sea, Nami finds the paper she needs to start making maps. If the Straw Hat crew can somehow manage to survive a deadly cyclone, she might actually get some use out of it!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Heavy fog leads to a close encounter of the culinary kind when Nico fishes a marine out of the drink. The aspiring chef is concerned about the quality of his curry, and Sanji is just the guy to refine his recipe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A break in the rain provides the perfect opportunity for Usopp to help a young girl fulfill her dream of launching the world’s largest firework.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Money troubles force Zoro to tangle with Dick the Bandit and his treacherous gang of thugs. These gun-toting outlaws are terrorizing a peaceful village, and the Straw Hat swordsman aims to stop their reign of terror!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A barrage of Marine cannon balls forces the Straw Hats to seek refuge on an uncharted island. Once ashore, the crew encounters a strange old man living amongst a herd of goats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Old man Zenny made a fortune lending money to scallywags, but he always dreamed of becoming a pirate himself. When the marines set out to trap the Straw Hats, the wily hermit may finally get his wish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zenny gets more than he bargained for when he embarks on his maiden pirate voyage. The Straw Hats may have made a friend for life, but what are they gonna do about those pesky marines?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As SG-1 tries to stop the spread of a deadly virus that was caused by the devious Ori, the Jaffa Gerak works on converting the rest of the Jaffa to worshippers of the Ori. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 sets out to destroy a massive and deadly weapon invented by their increasingly powerful foe, the Ori. If not, the Caledonian Federation and its people will be destroyed. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: While Teal'c sets off to investigate foul play on a Jaffa planet, Mitchell, Carter and Daniel become out of phase while experimenting with a powerful and ancient device. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Vala returns to Stargate Command to deliver startling news: the Ori have been building military forces, and plan to launch crusades against their dissidents in the near future. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: On a mission to find a weapon that will defeat their powerful foe, the team finds a planet whose inhabitants were killed by a mysterious illness, and unwittingly fall victim to the illness themselves. Starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.
